text: Hello? Yes, this is Cheryl. Good morning. My name is Jacob, so I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Tennessee State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? So where are you calling from? So I'm actually reaching out on behalf of your state's relief program because these benefits haven't been claimed yet and I want to help you get them processed. You're enrolled in Part A and Part B, right? So I'm a licensed Medicare agent.
